'''shahozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thanatolatry|thanatolatry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thanatolatry|thanatolatry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shahozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæhezheth|shæhezheth]] || [[word:shæhezhej|shæhezhej]] || [[word:shæhezhesh|shæhezhesh]] || [[word:shæhezhe|shæhezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahohozhoth|shahohozhoth]] || [[word:shahohozhoj|shahohozhoj]] || [[word:shahohozhosh|shahohozhosh]] || [[word:shahohozho|shahohozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahozhoth|shahozhoth]] || [[word:shahozhoj|shahozhoj]] || [[word:shahozhosh|shahozhosh]] || [[word:shahozho|shahozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahofzhoth|shahofzhoth]] || [[word:shahofzhoj|shahofzhoj]] || [[word:shahofzhosh|shahofzhosh]] || [[word:shahofzhof|shahofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shahozhotho|shahozhotho]] || [[word:shahozhojo|shahozhojo]] || [[word:shahozhosho|shahozhosho]] || [[word:shahozhoko|shahozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shahozhoth|shahozhoth]] || [[word:shahozhoj|shahozhoj]] || [[word:shahozhosh|shahozhosh]] || [[word:shahozho|shahozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shahozhothol|shahozhothol]] || [[word:shahozhojol|shahozhojol]] || [[word:shahozhoshol|shahozhoshol]] || [[word:shahozhokol|shahozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shahozhothotho|shahozhothotho]] || [[word:shahozhojojo|shahozhojojo]] || [[word:shahozhoshosho|shahozhoshosho]] || [[word:shahozhoko|shahozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shahozhothon|shahozhothon]] || [[word:shahozhojon|shahozhojon]] || [[word:shahozhoshon|shahozhoshon]] || [[word:shahozhokon|shahozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shahozhothoro|shahozhothoro]] || [[word:shahozhojoro|shahozhojoro]] || [[word:shahozhoshoro|shahozhoshoro]] || [[word:shahozhokoro|shahozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
